response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains, with 12+ years of relevant work and a strong alignment with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js, Vitest). His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz show direct experience with scaling systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and end-to-end feature development. He also has proven leadership in architecture decisions and collaboration with product teams, as well as a clear focus on testable, user-centric solutions.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and scalable systems
Strong background in architecture, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: Some educational background in fine arts/photography may not align with pure engineering focus
No explicit mention of Vitest, though testing expertise is demonstrated
